[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000001 1
6 100000000 1
7 000000000 a

01 10 100000000 1 match 6
12 21 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
23 32 010001000 2
34 43 011000000 2
45 54 010000000 1
56 65 000010000 1
67 76 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
70 07 000000001 1 match 5

02 20 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
13 31 000000100 1
24 42 010000000 1
35 53 010011100 4
46 64 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
57 75 010101000 3
60 06 000010000 1
71 17 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7

14 41 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
25 52 010101000 3
36 63 000010000 1
47 74 010000000 1
50 05 100010000 2
61 16 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
72 27 010101000 3

04 40 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
15 51 100000100 2
26 62 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 7
37 73 010001000 2
